media.name: SMM (Standard Mineral Medium, ref [18]) + 10 mM glycerol (PMC6921056)
media.base_medium_reference: Cited in the paper as ref [18]: Kurumbang N.P., Dvorak P., Bendl J., Brezovsky J., Prokop Z., Damborsky J. Computer-assisted engineering of the synthetic pathway for biodegradation of a toxic persistent pollutant. ACS Synth. Biol. 2014;3:172-181. DOI 10.1021/sb400147n; PMID 24313542. The full SMM composition (identical medium, same E. coli BL21(DE3) TCP-degradation system, same co-authors) is given verbatim in the PhD dissertation of P. Dvořák, Masaryk University (https://is.muni.cz/th/151419/prif_d/Dvorak_dizertace.pdf), which cites Assis H.M.S., Sallis P.J., Bull A.T., Hardman D.J. Biochemical characterization of a haloalcohol dehalogenase from Arthrobacter erithii H10a. Enzyme Microb. Technol. 1998;22:568-574 as the origin of the mineral base + trace-element/vitamin solutions.
media.citation: Medium composition from PMC6921056 (see GrowthDB record).
